entities.name: Rubric Excellence
entities.context: Evaluation framework for content quality with three scored dimensions

entities.name: Voice
entities.context: Quality metric measuring warmth (0.8) and human detail, scored 39/40

entities.name: Specificity
entities.context: Quality metric for concrete competitor mentions and real validation, scored 18-19/20

entities.name: Audience
entities.context: Quality metric for tailoring to reader context, scored 28-29/30

relationships.context: Voice is a scored dimension within the rubric
